{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Decree of Execution
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Decree of Execution]] is a technique that involves gripping and crumpling the fabric of space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
